# gravemint

> michigan-based electronic music artist since 2017. ethereal, melodically driven sounds exploring solitude, memory, atmosphere, and place

short summary: https://gravemint.com/llms.txt

## about

sounds from somewhere between a forest and a dream

gravemint is a michigan-based producer who has been making melodically driven electronic music since 2017. built from ethereal, reverb-laden synths, harps, pianos, ghostly vocal fragments, and textures often drawn from the natural world, his music explores themes of the transcendent, the mystical, and the ineffable

the sound of gravemint grew out of a wide range of influences. rock and metal early on, then edm and pop, and eventually everything from tycho to porter robinson

## discography

### maritime mystic (ep, 2019)

https://gravemint.com/music/maritime-mystic/

a vocaloid ep inspired by the pacific northwest. sparkly synths, harps, and ghostly vocals exploring loneliness, mystery, and an unfamiliar coast

gravemint's vocaloid debut, featuring synthesizer performances from miku and luka with full instrumental versions of every track. inspired by the beauty of the pacific northwest and the puget sound, maritime mystic explores the loneliness and wonder of arriving somewhere new, far from everyone you know. sparkly synths, harps, piano, and clean bass weave through themes of solitude, mystery, and the strange pull of an unfamiliar coast

tracks:
1. illuminate
2. misted mentha
3. maritime mystic
4. relinquish
5. illuminate (instrumental)
6. misted mentha (instrumental)
7. maritime mystic (instrumental)
8. relinquish (instrumental)

listen:
- spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/1F1HYiAuW2jTwEGdxosLq8
- apple: https://music.apple.com/us/album/maritime-mystic/1464429766
- youtube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLh2fnjD1SbdB6GFe96nqVcX_LcsZC8TP6
- bandcamp: https://gravemint.bandcamp.com/album/maritime-mystic
- soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/gravemint/sets/maritime-mystic
- amazon: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B07S1K7PGG
- tidal: https://tidal.com/album/109651370
- deezer: https://www.deezer.com/us/album/97421582
- iheart: https://www.iheart.com/artist/gravemint-32325028/albums/maritime-mystic-73567564

### cat cafe (ep, 2019)

https://gravemint.com/music/cat-cafe/

a two-sided release inspired by a cat cafe in downtown seattle: a breakneck glitch-adjacent track and a calm jazz-inflected piece with ambient purring and warm atmosphere

a two-sided release inspired by a cat cafe in downtown seattle, capturing the duality of cats. one version is a breakneck, glitch-adjacent track built on fast experimental beats and piano; the other a calm, jazz-inflected piece filled with ambient purring and warm atmosphere

tracks:
1. neon cat cafe
2. cat cafe piano

listen:
- spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/20mO0c9zXx2MjFSjx5H0EJ
- apple: https://music.apple.com/us/album/cat-cafe-single/1448825863
- youtube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLh2fnjD1SbdApIvjAds3WdbmsxyTq9Llp
- bandcamp: https://gravemint.bandcamp.com/album/cat-cafe
- soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/gravemint/sets/cat-cafe
- amazon: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B07MQ3DW91
- tidal: https://tidal.com/album/102025654
- deezer: https://www.deezer.com/us/album/83685262
- iheart: https://www.iheart.com/artist/gravemint-32325028/albums/cat-cafe-67715116

### sheltered neon (ep, 2018)

https://gravemint.com/music/sheltered-neon/

almost-downtempo electronica for the unknown of moving to a new city. sparse drops, evolving ambience, and the quiet solace of neon light at night

an almost-downtempo electronica record about the unknown of moving to a new city. sparse, dark drops give way to evolving ambience, with high pads and deliberate breaks that let the atmosphere breathe and shift. the quiet solace of a distant neon glow

tracks:
1. solace plaza
2. rooftop overgrowth
3. to metropolis
4. sheltered neon

listen:
- spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/2bxQH2XGpevo8pkrDgG8mI
- apple: https://music.apple.com/us/album/sheltered-neon-ep/1438823261
- youtube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLh2fnjD1SbdA4PEBxSdMPieMZoZdw8uAK
- bandcamp: https://gravemint.bandcamp.com/album/sheltered-neon
- soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/gravemint/sets/sheltered
- amazon: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B07JVQBW4G
- tidal: https://tidal.com/album/96559737
- deezer: https://www.deezer.com/us/album/75451202
- iheart: https://www.iheart.com/artist/gravemint-32325028/albums/sheltered-neon-63071143

### vicarious solitude (ep, 2018)

https://gravemint.com/music/vicarious-solitude/

gravemint's debut ep. sparkly synths, harps, and ghostly vocal chops tracing seasons, memories, and a grateful look back at who you used to be

gravemint's debut ep, structured around the seasons. sparkly synths, harps, ghostly vocal chops, piano, and delicate strings that open into something much larger. gratefully revisiting who you used to be, surrounded by everything that made you

tracks:
1. rain, hello
2. winter moon's installment
3. temporal blossom
4. soft gardens, warm nights

listen:
- spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/6Nc3nYDm89fRlFLgtvHw9x
- apple: https://music.apple.com/us/album/vicarious-solitude-ep/1434637371
- youtube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLh2fnjD1SbdCWSHJsyoLQnXf9gpo63pfd
- bandcamp: https://gravemint.bandcamp.com/album/vicarious-solitude
- soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/gravemint/sets/vicarious-solitude
- amazon: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B07GYTY11T
- tidal: https://tidal.com/album/94300286
- deezer: https://www.deezer.com/us/album/71892222

### keep us awake (single, 2017)

https://gravemint.com/music/keep-us-awake/

dreamy, high-energy electronica built on massive synths and driving piano. our desires keep us going and keep us from sleeping

a dreamy, high-energy electronic track built on enormous synths and a driving piano backing. somewhere between chillwave and ethereal electronica, about the dreams and desires that give us purpose and keep us awake at night

listen:
- spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/0di8JK6lUJhussV0bRpy0D
- apple: https://music.apple.com/us/album/keep-us-awake/1434517317
- youtube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IFk78_-pgpM
- bandcamp: https://gravemint.bandcamp.com/track/keep-us-awake
- soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/gravemint/keep-us-awake
- amazon: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B07GXF17NR
- tidal: https://tidal.com/album/94249763
- deezer: https://www.deezer.com/us/album/71794092

### ghost (single, 2017)

https://gravemint.com/music/ghost/

a glitchy experiment where nearly every instrument is a manipulated voice. a song about believing something completely, then looking back like a stranger

a glitchy, chiptune-adjacent experiment where nearly every instrument is gravemint's own voice, heavily modulated and transformed beyond recognition. about how completely you can believe something in the moment, and how foreign that feeling can look later. heavy beat, manipulated vocal layers, and a restless, distorted energy throughout

listen:
- spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/3rvRfvtzprvaHnsiT7nW9Z
- apple: https://music.apple.com/us/album/ghost-single/1434618308
- youtube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pmekEjYvYrg
- bandcamp: https://gravemint.bandcamp.com/track/ghost
- soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/gravemint/ghost
- amazon: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B07GY25PG2
- tidal: https://tidal.com/album/94282025

### kitten kibbu (single, 2017)

https://gravemint.com/music/kitten-kibbu/

where gravemint began. cat meows and purrs transformed into instruments, wrapped in atmosphere and a beat that quietly started everything

where gravemint began. built in a first daw session using manipulated cat meows and purrs as instruments. a strong beat with hats anchors the manipulated cat voices, with an ethereal drift underneath

listen:
- spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/7iylkvpw1tVpKCU9j6JJ9K
- apple: https://music.apple.com/us/album/kitten-kibbu-single/1434516559
- youtube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X1WBlDrklmk
- bandcamp: https://gravemint.bandcamp.com/track/kitten-kibbu
- soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/gravemint/kittenkibbu
- amazon: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B07GX8HFYS
- tidal: https://tidal.com/album/94245775
